name: dnz
description: Search DigitalNZ records and facets through a local MCP server.
long_description: DigitalNZ provides access to New Zealand cultural heritage records. This extension runs the dnz-mcp stdio server locally and exposes search and facet tools to MCP-compatible desktop clients.

tools.name: search_digitalnz
tools.description: Search DigitalNZ collection records for cultural heritage items, images, records, and other digitised resources.

tools.name: get_digitalnz_facets
tools.description: Harvest facet counts for DigitalNZ metadata fields such as category, collection, and content partner.

digitalnz_api_key.title: DigitalNZ API key
digitalnz_api_key.description: API key used for live DigitalNZ searches and facet requests.

dnz_cache_path.title: Optional cache path
dnz_cache_path.description: Optional SQLite cache file path for repeated DigitalNZ API calls.
